title: Veronica schmidtii

It belongs to the order Lamiales, a group of flowering plants that also includes mint, snapdragons, and honeysuckles. intro: Veronica schmidtii, also known as Schmidt's speedwell, is a flowering plant species in the Veronica genus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The bioactive constituents of Veronica schmidtii include iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
